createSubtitle: Set up your profile to start teaching
createProfileDesc: Complete your profile to start teaching and earning on the platform.
verifiedDesc: Your teacher profile has been verified. You can now teach and earn.
pendingDesc: Your documents are being reviewed. This usually takes 1-3 business days.
rejectedDesc: Your verification was rejected. Please update your documents and resubmit.
readyDesc: Your profile is complete. Submit your documents for verification.
incompleteDesc: Complete all required sections to submit for verification.
modalDesc: Please review the following requirements before submitting:
term5: Profile photo is professional and recent
importantNoticeDesc: Submitting false or misleading information may result in permanent account suspension. All documents will be reviewed by our verification team.
profileSubtitle: Fill in your personal and professional details
bioPlaceholder: Tell students about yourself, your teaching style, and experience...
photoSubtitle: Add a professional photo to your profile
req1: Clear, well-lit photo of your face
req3: JPG, PNG, or WebP format, max 5MB
frontHint: Upload the front side of your ID
backHint: Upload the back side of your ID
degreeHint: Upload your highest degree or diploma
certHint: Upload teaching certificates or other credentials
docMustBeClear: Documents must be clear, readable, and in color
loadFailed: Failed to load profile. Please try again.
createFailed: Failed to create profile. Please try again.
saveFailed: Failed to save profile. Please try again.
invalidImage: Please select a valid image file (JPG, PNG, WebP).
imageTooLarge: Image file is too large. Maximum size is 5MB.
uploadFailed: Failed to upload photo. Please try again.
invalidFormat: Please select a valid file (JPG, PNG, WebP, PDF).
fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.
docUploadFailed: Failed to upload document. Please try again.
docDeleteFailed: Failed to delete document. Please try again.
verifSubmitFailed: Failed to submit verification. Please try again.
